# MartianGamePublic
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Academic%20Research-Technion-darkblue?logo=data:image/png;base64,)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Made%20with-Blazor-darkorchid.png?logo=data:image)

The public repository for The Martian Game

### About

The Martian Game is a tool for simulating and measuring creative problem solving in realistic contexts. It offers a novel approach for
studying and analyzing complex cognitive tasks in research-based environments.

It aids to the study of question asking and supports the hypothesis that complex questions promote effective problem solving. 

##

This tool has been used by researchers from the Technion University of Technology, and a paper encompassing it's credibility has been
published March 22nd, 2026, which can be found [here (Cohen et al., 2026)](https://cognitive-complexity.net.technion.ac.il/files/2026/02/Cohen-Rafner-Sherson-Kenett-2026.pdf). 


### Installation

To read the installation guide, download and run the installation_guide/instructions.html file in your browser.

### Modifying the game

If you're planning to modify the game, It is strongly encouraged to first familiarize yourself with it's architecture. A detailed overview
of it can be found in the project-overview/overview.html file.
